subcodes.title: Words spoken in Jun. 1911 in Egypt
subcodes.first_line: Unity is love. It cannot be established without love. Therefore try, as far as possible, to be filled with love.
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @pain of love; love as veil, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @love as fundamental; spiritual foundations of religion, @unity; oneness of humanity
